title: AccountState
description: The canonical set of a profile's connected financial accounts with balances, sourced via the swappable aggregation provider behind SpineAggregationPort (FR-CORE-001/006). Provided by Module 0 to ALL modules. Money fields are integer minor units (MoneyCents); every account carries a FreshnessStamp. Balances are MONEY inputs: a stale balance MUST cause dependent recommendations to withhold (Constitution IV/VIII).

profile_id.description: Owning profile. AuthZ is enforced server-side against the validated session identity — never a client-supplied profile_id (FR-X-010 / FR-CORE-007, threat model IDOR; household visibility further gated by MemberScope per FR-HH-001).

household_id.description: Household this profile belongs to, if any. Cross-member visibility is gated by MemberScope; raw accounts are never exposed outside the owner's granted scope.

connection_completeness.description: complete = all of the user's known institutions connected; partial = some connected (consumers MUST surface an incomplete-data marker); none = no accounts (consumers show the Empty state, never zero-filled money).

account_id.description: Stable FinOS account id (not the aggregation provider's raw id).

aggregation_link_id.description: The ConnectionConsent/AggregationLink this account was sourced through. Null for manual/statement-import accounts.

mask.description: Last 2–4 digits only; never the full account number.

balance.description: Current balance in integer cents. For credit_card/line_of_credit this is the amount owed (negative = owed when normalized; see balance_kind).

available_balance.description: Optional available balance (e.g. after holds, or remaining credit). Integer cents.

credit_limit.description: Present for credit_card/line_of_credit; feeds CreditState utilization. Integer cents.

balance_kind.description: asset for deposit accounts; liability for credit/loan accounts. Lets consumers sum net position without sign-guessing.

ingestion_mode.description: aggregated = via provider; manual = user-entered; statement_import = parsed from an uploaded statement (institution-unavailable fallback, FR-CORE-006 edge case).

status.description: login_required/error drive the connection-repair UX; disconnected/revoked accounts retain last-known balance marked stale, never shown as current.

freshness.description: Freshness of the overall account-state snapshot (oldest member freshness governs).
